title: Basic JavaScript Math and Random
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Math and Random. Focus on implementing Math properties (PI, E, etc.) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Math and Random
description: Create a function that uses Math properties (PI, E, etc.) and Math methods (abs, pow, sqrt, sin, cos) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Math and Random Project
description: Build a small application that applies Math properties (PI, E, etc.), Math methods (abs, pow, sqrt, sin, cos), Generating random numbers in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Math and Random
description: The following code has bugs related to Math properties (PI, E, etc.). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Math and Random
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Math properties (PI, E, etc.) and Math methods (abs, pow, sqrt, sin, cos).
